subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — we're glad Partner Corp is interested in exploring collaboration possibilities. I'd be happy to arrange an introductory call.

Regarding timing, would either of these slots work for you?
- Tuesday, April 7th at 2:00 PM UTC
- Thursday, April 9th at 10:00 AM UTC

If neither suits, feel free to propose alternatives and we'll work around your schedule.

To help us prepare, could you share more about the specific areas of synergy you've identified between our roadmaps? That'll ensure we have the right folks on the call.

On the contact directory request — for privacy and security reasons, we don't share internal contact details externally. I'll ensure any appropriate internal stakeholders are looped in through official channels as our discussions progress.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
